_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: [jurisdictional_scope] The jurisdictional scope is the European Union; the regulation "shall be binding in its entirety and directly applicable in all Member States."
prior.source_span: This Regulation shall be binding in its entirety and directly applicable in all Member States.
